stage_summary.summary_text: Stage 3 for sen4_edge2_clouddb: attacker A2_sensor_http_abuse_sen4 met defender D1_quarantine_sen4. The defender choice focused on quarantining sen4 is the most effective action to contain the attacker, as it has already reached this sensor and further progress would be blocked. After execution the path stage was 3, and the observed outcome was attack remained active after the defender stage.
